label: ERC-7715 — grant 0.5 ETH/day spend to a session key
notes: ERC-7715 (draft) — wallet capability that mints a *session key* with bounded spending power. Here the user grants a session key the right to spend up to ~0.5 ETH (0x6f05b59d3b20000 wei) per 86400-second window (1 day) until `expiry`. Schema currently has no dedicated action for ERC-7715, so mappers/sign emits a `sign_message` envelope as fallback (sign_message.primaryType = 'wallet_grantPermissions' for matching). Real wallet integration is still rare — Coinbase Smart Wallet is the lead implementor.
